Let's jump into that.
So Apartment IQ is a data analytic tool that it's going to centralize market survey data for you.
Our hope is that this will eliminate the need for you to call around for pricing uh to source out information about your competitors.

Uh We hope to give you the information that you're looking for updated on a daily basis uh so that you can make those data informed decisions on pricing or any other insights that you're looking for for your properties.
Now, as I mentioned, department IQ is updated every 24 hours and all of the data that we are leveraging in here is 100% public So you don't need to worry about private data sharing.
Rest assured we are using 100% public data.
